wizardDescription: Boards and items as CSV files

setup.instructions: Go to monday.com → Avatar → Developers → My Access Tokens → Show/Generate

resources.name: boards
resources.description: Monday.com boards with all items as CSV rows

pull.query: { boards(limit: 50) { id name description state board_kind groups { id title } items_page(limit: 200) { items { id name group { id title } column_values { id title text type } } } } }

pagination.queryTemplate: { boards(limit: 50) { id name description state board_kind groups { id title } items_page(limit: {limit}, after: "{cursor}") { cursor items { id name group { id title } column_values { id title text type } } } } }

create.mutation: mutation($boardId: ID!, $itemName: String!, $columnValues: JSON) { create_item(board_id: $boardId, item_name: $itemName, column_values: $columnValues) { id } }

update.mutation: mutation($boardId: ID!, $itemId: ID!, $columnValues: JSON) { change_multiple_column_values(board_id: $boardId, item_id: $itemId, column_values: $columnValues) { id } }
